businessContext_i18n.fr: Débit de la pompe à vide.
businessContext_i18n.es: Flujo de la bomba de vacío.

rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

formulas.sonuc: (posetHacim / Math.max(0.0001, pompaDebi)) * Math.log(Math.max(0.0001, baslangicBasinc / Math.max(0.0001, hedefBasinc)))

hiddenLossDrivers: Waste in material or time indicates process improvement opportunity.
suggestedActions: Optimize drying/cooling parameters for cycle time reduction.
Monitor defects and adjust process conditions accordingly.

description.short: Calculate vacuum pump time to reach target pressure.
description.long: Calculate vacuum pump time to reach target pressure.

short_i18n.en: Calculate vacuum pump time to reach target pressure.
short_i18n.tr: Istenen vakum seviyesine ulasmak icin gereken pompa Operating Timeni hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie die Zeit der Vakuumpumpe, um den Zieldruck zu erreichen.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer le temps de pompage sous vide pour atteindre la pression cible.
short_i18n.es: Calcular el tiempo de la bomba de vacío para alcanzar la presión objetivo.
short_i18n.ar: حساب وقت مضخة التفريغ للوصول إلى الضغط المستهدف.
